heading: Grants authorized
label: 3057d Grants authorized
text: The Assistant Secretary may make grants to eligible tribal organizations to pay all of the costs for delivery of supportive services and nutrition services for older individuals who are Indians.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3057d, , as added , , ; amended , , , provided that in establishing administrative regulations the Commissioner consult with the Secretary of the Interior, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by . See section 3057 of this title.Pub. L. 89–73, title VI, § 605Pub. L. 95–478, title I, § 10692 Stat. 1551Pub. L. 97–115, § 13(c)95 Stat. 1608Pub. L. 100–175Oct. 18, 1978Dec. 29, 1981l
Amendments1993— substituted “Assistant Secretary” for “Commissioner”.Pub. L. 103–1711992— inserted “individuals who are” after “older”.Pub. L. 102–375
